heading: Identification in budget materials of amounts for declassification activities and limitation on expenditures for such activities
label: 6235 Identification in budget materials of amounts for declassification activities and limitation on expenditures for such activities
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 2675 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1)

children.heading: .—Amounts for Declassification of Records
children.label: a .—Amounts for Declassification of Records
children.text: The Secretary of Energy shall include in the budget justification materials submitted to Congress in support of the Department of Energy budget for any fiscal year (as submitted with the budget of the President under ) specific identification, as a budgetary line item, of the amounts required to carry out programmed activities during that fiscal year to declassify records pursuant to Executive Order No. 13526 ( note), or any successor Executive order, or to comply with any statutory requirement to declassify Government records.section 1105(a) of title 3150 U.S.C. 3161

children.heading: .—Certification Required With Respect to Automatic Declassification of Records
children.label: b .—Certification Required With Respect to Automatic Declassification of Records
children.text: No records of the Department of Energy that have not as of , been reviewed for declassification shall be subject to automatic declassification unless the Secretary of Energy certifies to Congress that such declassification would not harm the national security.October 5, 1999
